title: Airmash: Squadron Sync
description: Tap incoming missile beats to keep your airmash squadron in sync and survive a 3-minute multiplayer sky raid.

howToPlayJson.title: Airmash: Squadron Sync
howToPlayJson.objective: Defend your tiny multiplayer air squad by tapping missile pings on-beat, chaining perfect interceptions, and keeping the formation alive until the timer ends.

controls.input: Tap a falling missile ring as it closes over your squad marker
controls.outcome: Destroys the missile and adds to combo if timed on-beat

controls.input: Tap and hold, then slide left or right across the three sky lanes
controls.outcome: Moves your squad marker to the busiest lane for the next beat

controls.input: Two-finger tap when the meter is full
controls.outcome: Clears all current missiles on screen and preserves combo through a dense wave

steps: Missiles descend in three air lanes toward your multiplayer squad formation at the center of the screen.
Each missile has a shrinking beat ring; tap exactly as the ring meets the squad marker to score a Perfect, Good, or Miss.
Perfect taps build combo and raise a score multiplier; missed beats break combo and remove one shield plane from the formation.
Every 20 seconds the song intensifies, missile patterns get denser, and fake off-beat decoy drones start appearing.
Survive until the 2-4 minute track ends, or fail early if all shield planes are destroyed.
howToPlayJson.scoring: Perfect interceptions score the most and increase a combo multiplier up to x8. Good hits score base points without boosting as fast. Each full 25-hit streak grants a temporary 'multiplayer link' bonus where both side squ
tips: Watch the shrinking ring, not the missile sprite.
Slide lanes early during quieter bars so you are set for dense choruses.
Save Burst Cancel for mixed real-missile and decoy patterns.
Long perfect streaks matter more than frantic tapping.
